name: zotero-docx-reference-manager
description: Manage Zotero-backed references for academic Word DOCX manuscripts.

interface.shortDescription: Manage Zotero citations, bibliographies, PDFs, and DOCX references.
interface.longDescription: A Codex plugin for academic manuscript reference cleanup: inspect Zotero collections, download and verify PDFs, insert live Zotero fields into Word DOCX files, generate bibliography fields, and prepare safe Zotero attachment import scripts.
defaultPrompt: Clean up Zotero citations in my DOCX manuscript.
Download and verify PDFs for a Zotero collection.
Generate a Zotero attachment import script.
